channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Putin arrives in China for talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin has arrived in Beijing for talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Gaza flotilla organisers amid Israeli crackdown
item.description: Rights advocate accuses Washington of using 'terrorism label' to shut down Palestine activism internationally.

item.title: Israel’s far-right Finance Minister Smotrich says ICC seeking his arrest
item.description: After an ICC warrant request, Israel's Smotrich threatened to displace Palestinians from the West Bank.

item.title: Tributes pour in for ‘hero’ guard killed in San Diego mosque shooting
item.description: Amin Abdullah, the security guard killed while trying to stop gunmen entering the Islamic Centre of San Diego.

item.title: Trump says Xi assured him China would not send weapons to Iran
item.description: US president also says he could again strike Iran if progress on ceasefire is not made within 'days'.

item.title: I knew Amin Abdullah, the hero of the San Diego mosque shooting
item.description: It doesn't surprise me at all that he gave his life saving the lives of others. He was a true American Muslim.

item.title: How the shape of a map can determine the US midterm elections
item.description: With less than six months to midterms, Al Jazeera explains how district boundaries may determine who controls the House.

item.title: At least 22 killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon in 24 hours: Ministry
item.description: Lebanon death toll since March 2 has reached 3,042, according to the country's Health Ministry.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz withdraws from Wimbledon with wrist injury
item.description: Former world number one says he's still not ready to compete as he recovers from a serious injury sustained in April.

item.title: Pakistan sentences man to death for killing TikTok star Sana Yousaf
item.description: The verdict against Umar Hayat who killed a teenage influencer in her home 'is for the entire society', her father says.

item.title: Security guards face probe after last week’s Philippine Senate shooting
item.description: Authorities say the shooting was not an 'attack on the Senate' and identified the person who fired the first shot.

item.title: Qatar says US-Iran negotiations need ‘more time’
item.description: Qatar’s foreign ministry says more time is needed for US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: At least one killed, 21 wounded in car bomb explosion in Syria’s Damascus
item.description: Blast occurs near Defence Ministry building in Bab Sharqi district of the capital.

item.title: LIVE: Bournemouth vs Man City – Premier League
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full team news coverage, before our text commentary stream.

item.title: Neymar is going to the World Cup: Why did Brazil name him in the squad?
item.description: Oft-injured superstar hasn't played for the national team since 2023, but he's back in the squad before World Cup 2026.

item.title: Flight to Argentina: How significant is it for Israel’s LatAm outreach?
item.description: Experts say Israel is using the new flight as a geopolitical tool to cement its footprint in Latin America.

item.title: Resistance: who gets to decide?
item.description: Who decides if resistance is legitimate?

item.title: Why has FIFA not signed a World Cup broadcast deal in India?
item.description: With the World Cup weeks away, FIFA is struggling to find broadcast rights buyers in the world’s most populous country.

item.title: US extends sanctions waiver on Russian oil: Why it matters
item.description: The US has extended its waiver on sanctioned Russian oil until June 17.

item.title: Ronaldo to lead Portugal at sixth World Cup as Martinez names squad
item.description: Diogo Jota named as an honorary 'plus-one' player in Portugal's squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Who was Amin Abdullah, the ‘hero’ guard killed in San Diego shooting?
item.description: Tributes have poured in for the guard, who was among the three people killed in the shooting at the San Diego mosque.

item.title: Suspected car bomb explodes in Syrian capital Damascus
item.description: Plumes of smoke from a suspected car bomb explosion outside an armament management centre in Damascus.

item.title: China-Russia relations are as strong as ever thanks to Trump
item.description: The US president failed to ‘un-unite’ the two powers because he has repeated the same mistakes his predecessors made.

item.title: Son of Palestinian president elected to Fatah’s top leadership body
item.description: Son of Palestinian president elected to Fatah’s top leadership body

item.title: Israeli far-right minister Smotrich says ICC seeks his arrest
item.description: Smotrich is the third Israeli official targeted by the ICC, after Netanyahu and Gallant, for war crimes in Gaza.
